item.title: Black Box Ltd Surges 8.21% to Day's High of Rs 945.15 — Outperforms Sector by 7.32 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.46% on 18 May 2026, while Black Box Ltd surged 8.21%, marking a remarkable 7.32-percentage-point outperformance over its sector peers. This sharp single-session gain rewrites the short-term narrative for the stock, which also hit a new 52-week high of Rs 945.15 during the day. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Bloom Dekor Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 8.3 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: Bloom Dekor Ltd’s stock price reached a fresh 52-week low of Rs.8.3 on 18 May 2026, marking a significant decline amid ongoing market pressures and company-specific challenges. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting persistent headwinds in its financial and technical profile. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts TD Power Systems Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1344.95
item.description: Surging to an all-time high of Rs 1344.95 on 18 May 2026, TD Power Systems Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outpacing its sector and the broader market with a 172.39% gain over the past year. This milestone caps a four-day winning streak that has propelled the stock 14.97% higher, underscoring a powerful technical rally amid a challenging market backdrop. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Grindwell Norton Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 1899.95
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 1899.95 on 18 May 2026, Grindwell Norton Ltd. has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a notable milestone in its price momentum. This advance comes amid a backdrop of strong technical signals that have aligned to propel the stock beyond previous resistance levels. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: C.E. Info Systems Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amidst Price Pressure on 18 May 2026
item.description: C.E. Info Systems Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 18 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 936.8 as the stock faced notable price pressure. The software products company underperformed its sector and broader market indices, continuing a downward trend that has persisted over recent sessions. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Sasken Technologies Ltd Surges 7.18% to Day's High of Rs 1840 — Outperforms Sector by 5.76 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.62% on 18 May 2026, while Sasken Technologies Ltd surged 7.18%, touching an intraday high of Rs 1840. This 5.76-percentage-point outperformance over its sector signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: HLE Glascoat Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amidst Price Pressure on 18 May 2026
item.description: HLE Glascoat Ltd experienced significant intraday weakness on 18 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 294.95, marking a 7.5% decline from previous levels. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting persistent selling pressure amid a challenging market environment. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Below All Moving Averages and Now at Lower Circuit: Highway Infrastructure Ltd Loses 5.0% in a Single Session
item.description: At Rs 47.35, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Highway Infrastructure Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 5.0% on 18 May 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price that capped losses for the day. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Synoptics Technologies Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 5.0% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 54.15, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Synoptics Technologies Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 5.0% on 18 May 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.description: At Rs 283.05, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Jainam Ferro Alloys (I) Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 4.98% on 18 May 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Gayatri Highways Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 2.95% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 2.26, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Gayatri Highways Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 5% on 18 May 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, signalling persistent selling pressure in a micro-cap stock with limited liquidity. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Likhitha Infrastructure Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 4.79% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 195, Likhitha Infrastructure Ltd locked at its lower circuit on 18 May 2026, falling 4.79% within a 5% price band. Despite sellers lining up to exit, there were no buyers willing to absorb the supply, resulting in a freeze at the floor price and unfilled sell orders. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Below All Moving Averages and Now at Lower Circuit: Rudrabhishek Enterprises Ltd Loses 4.45% in a Single Session
item.description: At Rs 69.34, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Rudrabhishek Enterprises Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 4.45% on 18 Jun 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, signalling a pronounced imbalance in supply and demand. Time: 22 minutes ago

Uniinfo Telecom Services Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 5% on 18 Jun 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, signalling a pronounced imbalance in supply and demand. item.description: At Rs 4.28, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Tijaria Polypipes Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 2.22% on 15 May 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Ankit Metal & Power Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 3.64% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 1.59, Ankit Metal & Power Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 3.64% on 18 May 2026, with sellers lined up but no buyers willing to absorb the supply. The 5% price band limited the maximum daily loss, yet the unfilled sell orders highlight persistent selling pressure and a frozen price. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Premier Energies Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Positive Market Momentum
item.description: Premier Energies Ltd (symbol: PREMIERENE) has witnessed a significant 20.43% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling a notable shift in market positioning. This increase accompanies a strong volume uptick and a series of consecutive gains, suggesting growing investor confidence despite a broader sector downturn. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Reliance Home Finance Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 3.59% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 2.12, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Reliance Home Finance Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 3.59% on 18 May 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, reflecting persistent selling pressure in a micro-cap stock with limited liquidity. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Cochin Shipyard Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Weak Price Action
item.description: Cochin Shipyard Ltd (COCHINSHIP) has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, rising by 11.33% to 18,825 contracts, even as the stock price continues to decline. This divergence between rising open interest and falling prices signals a complex market positioning scenario, with investors potentially increasing bearish bets or hedging existing long exposures amid weakening fundamentals. Time: 22 minutes ago
